title: Fiery Charred Russian Rice Sushi
description: A charred, crispy, and spicy Russian-inspired sushi dish featuring rice paper sheets and nigiri-shaping, friendly to gluten-free diets.

ingredients.name: Rice paper sheets
ingredients.notes: Round and large enough to wrap filling

instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium-high heat to achieve a charred effect.
Prepare the spicy sausage by slicing it into thin strips and cooking until browned.
In a large bowl, mix together the pre-cooked Russian rice, pickled ginger, crispy onions, and a pinch of salt.
Lay a rice paper sheet flat on a clean surface and place about 1/4 cup of the rice mixture in the center of the sheet.
Add a few slices of the cooked spicy sausage on top of the rice mixture.
Drizzle a small amount of fiery sauce over the sausage and rice.
Fold the bottom half of the rice paper sheet up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the sheet to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients to form 12 sushi rolls.
Char the sushi rolls on the preheated skillet or griddle for about 2-3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Serve the charred sushi rolls hot with additional fiery sauce for dipping.
